nasb.text: Then he shall take off his garments and put on other garments, and carry the ashes outside the camp to a clean place.

esv.text: Then he shall take off his garments and put on other garments and carry the ashes outside the camp to a clean place.

cnv.text: 然後脫去這些衣服，穿上別的衣服，把灰拿出營外潔淨的地方。

ccb.text: 然后，他要更换衣服，把灰烬拿到营外洁净的地方。
